seasons.summer: Water plants regularly and provide shade during extreme heat.
seasons.autumn: Prepare soil and plant bulbs for spring.
seasons.winter: Protect plants from frost and reduce watering.
seasons.spring: Plant new flowers and fertilize soil.

plants.tomatoes: Require full sun and consistent watering.
plants.roses: Prune regularly and ensure good airflow.
plants.lettuce: Prefers cool weather and moist soil.
plants.herbs: Need good drainage and moderate sunlight.

watering.answer: Water deeply but less frequently to encourage strong root growth.

soil.answer: Use nutrient-rich, well-draining soil with organic matter.

sunlight.answer: Most plants require at least 6 hours of sunlight daily.

fertilizer.answer: Apply balanced fertilizer during the growing season.
